ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa pre-encryption chain: BYOVD/Defender-tamper + shadow copy deletion + service termination
ucs.description: Hunts Medusa ransomware's characteristic pre-encryption sequence on a single host within a short window: disabling Defender/AV via PowerShell or a renamed BYOVD loader (e.g., 'gaze.exe', 'smuol.exe'), wiping VSS shadows with vssadmin/wmic, breaking recovery via bcdedit, and stopping backup/SQL services via net stop or sc.exe. CISA AA25-071A documents this exact chain executed by Medusa affiliates after PsExec-driven lateral movement.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_name) as proc_names values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*shadow*delete*","*shadowcopy*delete*")) OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*catalog*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*stop*MSSQL*","*stop*Veeam*","*stop*Backup*","*stop*SQLWriter*","*stop*SQLAgent*","*stop*Sophos*","*stop*MsMpSvc*","*delete*MsMpSvc*")) OR (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" AND (Processes.process="*Set-MpPreference*DisableRealtimeMonitoring*$true*" OR Processes.process="*Add-MpPreference*ExclusionPath*" OR Processes.process="*Uninstall-WindowsFeature*Windows-Defender*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("gaze.exe","smuol.exe","openit.exe") OR Processes.original_file_name IN ("gaze.exe","smuol.exe")) by Processes.dest Processes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval action=case(match(proc_names,"vssadmin|wmic|wbadmin"),"vss_wipe",match(proc_names,"bcdedit"),"recovery_disable",match(proc_names,"net|sc"),"service_stop",match(proc_names,"powershell"),"defender_tamper",match(proc_names,"gaze|smuol|openit"),"medusa_payload",1=1,"other") | stats dc(action) as distinct_actions values(action) as actions values(cmdlines) as cmdlines min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by dest user | where distinct_actions>=3 OR mvfind(actions,"medusa_payload")>=0 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let window = 30m;
let suspects = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine), pname = tolower(FileName)
| extend bucket = case(
    pname in ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe") and cmd has_any ("shadows delete","shadowcopy delete","shadowstorage"),"vss_wipe",
    pname == "bcdedit.exe" and (cmd has "recoveryenabled no" or cmd has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"),"recovery_disable",
    pname == "wbadmin.exe" and cmd has "delete catalog","backup_wipe",
    pname in ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") and cmd has_any ("stop mssql","stop veeam","stop sqlwriter","stop sqlagent","stop backup","stop sophos","stop msmpsvc","delete msmpsvc"),"service_stop",
    pname == "powershell.exe" and (cmd has "set-mppreference" and cmd has "disablerealtimemonitoring" and cmd has "true") or cmd has "add-mppreference -exclusionpath" or (cmd has "uninstall-windowsfeature" and cmd has "windows-defender"),"defender_tamper",
    pname in ("gaze.exe","smuol.exe","openit.exe") or tolower(ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName) in ("gaze.exe","smuol.exe"),"medusa_payload",
    "")
| where isnotempty(bucket)
| project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, bucket, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
suspects
| summarize buckets = make_set(bucket), evidence = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25), firstSeen = min(Timestamp), lastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, window)
| extend bucketCount = array_length(buckets), hasMedusaPayload = iff(buckets has "medusa_payload", true, false)
| where bucketCount >= 3 or hasMedusaPayload
| order by lastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Medusa is operationally distinct from other RaaS in that affiliates almost always run a tightly scripted batch (often KillAV.bat / DoIt.bat) that fans out vssadmin, bcdedit, wbadmin and net/sc service-stop calls in seconds, then drops the encryptor as gaze.exe / smuol.exe (renamed). Requiring ≥3 distinct destructive buckets within 30 minutes on one host filters legitimate admin activity (which rar

ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa staging: Rclone exfil to MEGA / cloud combined with portable RMM (AnyDesk, Splashtop, ConnectWise) install on a server
ucs.description: Hunts Medusa's signature double-extortion staging: an affiliate plants a portable RMM (AnyDesk, Atera, Splashtop, eHorus, ConnectWise ScreenConnect) for hands-on-keyboard access on a server, then runs rclone.exe to push data to mega.nz / mega.io / pCloud before encryption. This RMM+rclone combo on a non-workstation host is a Medusa fingerprint per CISA AA25-071A and Symantec's Spearwing reporting.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_path) as paths from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("rclone.exe","restic.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*mega*","*pcloud*","*--config*","*copy*","*sync*","*--transfers*","*--multi-thread*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("AnyDesk.exe","AteraAgent.exe","SplashtopStreamer.exe","eHorus_agent.exe","ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe","ConnectWiseControl.ClientSetup.exe") AND (Processes.process_path="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Temp\\*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval kind=if(match(process_name,"rclone|restic"),"exfil_tool","portable_rmm") | stats values(process_name) as proc_names values(cmdlines) as cmdlines values(kind) as kinds dc(kind) as kind_count min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by dest user | where kind_count>=2 OR (mvfind(kinds,"exfil_tool")>=0 AND mvfind(cmdlines,"mega")>=0) | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | join type=left dest [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_category="server" by All_Traffic.src | rename All_Traffic.src as dest | fields dest count] | rename count as server_traffic_count
ucs.kql:
let window = 1h;
let rmm_paths = dynamic([@"\programdata\", @"\users\public\", @"\temp\", @"\appdata\local\temp\"]);
let rmm_bins = dynamic(["anydesk.exe","ateraagent.exe","splashtopstreamer.exe","ehorus_agent.exe","screenconnect.clientservice.exe","connectwisecontrol.clientsetup.exe","sra.exe"]);
let exfil = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName in~ ("rclone.exe","restic.exe")
   or tolower(ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName) in ("rclone.exe","restic.exe")
| extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where cmd has_any ("mega.nz","mega.io","pcloud","backblaze","--remote"," copy "," sync ","--transfers","--multi-thread-streams")
| project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, kind="exfil_tool", FileName, ProcessCommandLine, FolderPath;
let rmm = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where tolower(FileName) in (rmm_bins)
| where tolower(FolderPath) has_any (rmm_paths)
| project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, kind="portable_rmm", FileName, ProcessCommandLine, FolderPath;
let combined = union exfil, rmm;
combined
| summarize kinds = make_set(kind), evidence = make_set(strcat(FileName, " :: ", ProcessCommandLine), 25), firstSeen = min(Timestamp), lastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, window)
| where array_length(kinds) >= 2 or kinds has "exfil_tool"
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where RemoteUrl has_any ("mega.nz","mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega.co.nz","pcloud.com","transfer.sh")
    | summarize netHits = count(), netDest = make_set(RemoteUrl, 10) by DeviceId
) on DeviceId
| order by lastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Most RaaS crews exfil via MEGA, but Medusa's distinguishing pattern is dropping a *portable* RMM into ProgramData/Public/Temp on the same host (frequently a file or DC server) that runs rclone — the affiliate uses the RMM as their persistence/operator channel while rclone streams to MEGA. Pairing those two signals on one host within an hour is rare in benign environments (legitimate AnyDesk/Atera
